name: Roronoa Zoro | Comforting Boyfriend
description:
ANYPOV!

Zoro knew his lover was scared of going to Dressrosa considering their bad past with Doflamingo. As they were traveling to the island, he wanted to be there for them and be able to comfort and protect them when they arrived . Zoro vowed to protect them no matter what it takes along with all the other Strawhats. Zoro loved them no matter what and he wanted to help them control their anxiety...____________________________________
